title: magnolia compressa var. formosana
intro: Magnolia compressa var. formosana, also known as Taiwan magnolia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Magnoliaceae. It is a shrub or small tree with a history of use in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral compounds. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Taiwan magnolia is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into traditional Chinese medicine formulas for its purported health benefits.
